meta.title: Broken Egg — 3D Interactive Simulation
meta.description: Show the product that was trapped in blueprints — as if it could be touched. Broken Egg's 3D interactive simulation and XR industrial-safety training solutions.

cases.title: Broken Egg — Case Studies
cases.description: Real customer deployments using Broken Egg's 3D simulation manuals and catalogs. Explore each case with its intro video and interactive 3D experience.

services.title: Broken Egg — Services
services.description: From exhibitions and training manuals to web publishing, sales meetings, and presentations — how Broken Egg's 3D simulation is put to work.

about.title: Broken Egg — Company
about.description: About Broken Egg Inc. — overview, growth timeline, leadership, and academic-industry partners of a responsive 3D simulation and XR solutions company.

hero.headlineLine1: The product once trapped in blueprints —
hero.headlineLine2: show it as if it could be touched

items.title: Limits of explanation
items.body: Complex equipment and precision parts can't convey a product's true value to customers through 2D images and text alone.

items.title: Gaps in safety training
items.body: The risks and costs of hands-on field training make true-to-life, immersive training environments an urgent need.

items.title: Sustainable response
items.body: Cutting paper manuals and physical samples while reducing carbon emissions through digital twins has become an essential corporate task.

items.quote: Thanks to Broken Egg's 3D simulation, we could perfectly demonstrate the internal structure of our product to overseas buyers. It's a core driver of our sales growth.
items.name: Kim Jin-woo

items.quote: After moving our hazardous chemical-process training to XR, the accident rate among new hires dropped 40%. It's the most innovative safety solution we've used.
items.name: Lee Seo-yoon

cases.headlineLine1: Products shown as if they could be touched —
cases.sub: We've gathered how our 3D simulation manuals and catalogs were used in the field. See each case's intro video and interactive 3D experience for yourself.
cases.expBar: Tap the image to experience BROKEN EGG's service

sokool.description: Equipped with a patented antibacterial aluminum chamber for efficient cooling transfer.

cslab.description: An automatic maker built for large-scale cocktail production.

servicesPage.headlineLine1: From exhibitions to training, sales, and presentations —
servicesPage.sub: We've laid out where 3D simulation — which shows complex products and concepts as if they could be touched — is actually used.

exhibition.title: Exhibition demos, at home and abroad
body: Realistic 3D simulation visualizes complex systems and concepts vividly, making them easy to understand.
This lets stakeholders preview what a product or project will actually look like, in advance.

training.title: Training manuals
body: For new-product training, and when developing new products or attracting investment, 3D simulation lets you review design and function before building a real prototype —
so design errors are caught and fixed early, saving significant time and cost.

website.title: Web publishing
body: 3D simulation can demonstrate various scenarios and products, conveying a product's explanation visually.

sales.title: In-person sales & investor meetings
body: In face-to-face sales, 3D simulation builds shared understanding, enables better decisions, and drives purchases.

presentation.title: Presentations
body: 3D simulation is a powerful tool for presenting a product or project to investors effectively.
Visually persuasive demos earn investors' trust and make raising investment easier.

hero.headlineLine2: into an experience you can touch
hero.sub: Broken Egg transforms the experience of products, training, and industrial safety with responsive 3D simulation and XR technology. Here's the path we've walked and the people who walked it with us.

overview.headlineLine2: shown as if it could be touched
overview.lead: Broken Egg builds responsive 3D simulation and XR solutions you experience right in the browser, so anyone can grasp complex products and concepts intuitively.

values.service: Egg One — responsive 3D manuals, catalogs & guides

demo.title: Request a demo
demo.desc: Curious about the product or how to adopt it? Leave a note and we'll reply within 1–2 business days.
demo.name: Name
demo.messagePh: Tell us your goals, timeline, and any questions.
demo.consentTitle: Consent to collection & use of personal data
demo.consentLabel: I agree to the collection and use of my personal data.
demo.policy:
Broken Egg collects and uses your personal data as follows, to confirm and respond to your demo request.

1. Items collected: company, name, contact, email, message
2. Purpose: confirming and responding to the demo request
3. Retention: kept for 1 year after the inquiry is resolved, then destroyed
4. You may decline consent; if you do, acceptance of your demo request may be limited.
demo.successBody1: We'll get back to you within 1–2 business days
